$comment: Wave 23 §23.B.4 — Artifact integrity ledger. One entry per managed artifact under .specify/specs/<feature-id>/. Each entry records the SHA-256 of the file contents at the time the SDD CLI last wrote it, the phase that produced it, the timestamp, and the agent id responsible for the write. The runtime ledger is .specify/.artifact-hashes.json (created on first artifact write); this file is the documented schema reference plus a worked example.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the file contents at write time.

written-by.description: Agent id or CLI subcommand that performed the write.
